phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the historic clock tower
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver a torre do relógio histórica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo eesh-TAW-ree-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Early 20th-century Portuguese railway architecture prominently features exterior clock towers for public timekeeping.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na fachada exterior da estação.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH fuh-SHAH-duh ehsh-tih-REEOHR DUH shtuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the station's exterior facade.

responses.english: Good morning, on the station's exterior facade.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH fuh-SHAH-duh ehsh-tih-REEOHR DUH shtuh-SOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, na fachada exterior da estação.

phrases.text_local: Qual é a plataforma para Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh PUH-ruh leezh-BOHUH?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the adjacent tourist office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de turismo adjacente?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah oo POHS-too jee too-REES-moo ah-jah-SEN-chee
phrases.cultural_note: Municipal tourist offices are legally required to be co-located with major transport hubs.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado da estação.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DUH shtuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's next to the station.

responses.english: Good morning, it's next to the station.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DUH shtuh-SOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica ao lado da estação.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the historic clock tower
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a torre do relógio histórica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo eesh-TAW-ree-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The historic clock tower is a notable feature of Cascais station.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio histórica.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo eesh-TAW-ree-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the historic Clock Tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the historic Clock Tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo eesh-TAW-ree-kuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio histórica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Climate-controlled waiting areas in historic stations are typically elevated for better airflow.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a sala de espera.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a sala de espera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the adjacent tourist office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo?
phrases.cultural_note: Cascais train station has a tourist office adjacent to the main building.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tourist Office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tourist Office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Posto de Turismo.

phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a plataforma três?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh TREHSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Color-coded signage is the standard navigation method in Portuguese rail infrastructure.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga os indicadores azuis.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH een-dee-kuh-DOH-rihsh uh-ZOOEESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the blue signs.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the blue signs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH een-dee-kuh-DOH-rihsh uh-ZOOEESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga os indicadores azuis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the manned ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira com atendimento presencial?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh KOHM uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too preh-zayng-SEEAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese transit staff prioritize direct location markers and avoid unnecessary pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the ticket office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a bilheteira.
